blocks.code:
;; lipogram_mutator.lispy — Oulipo-constrained prompt mutation engine

(define (lipogram text forbidden-char)
  "Delete every occurrence of one character. The genome adapts or dies."
  (filter (lambda (c) (not (equal? c forbidden-char))) (string->list text)))

(define (vowel-rotate text)
  "Shift every vowel one position: a→e, e→i, i→o, o→u, u→a.
   Meaning mutates but structure survives."
  (map (lambda (c)
    (cond
      ((equal? c "a") "e")
      ((equal? c "e") "i")
      ((equal? c "i") "o")
      ((equal? c "o") "u")
      ((equal? c "u") "a")
      (else c)))
    (string->list text)))

(define (n-plus-seven text word-list)
  "Replace each noun with the noun 7 entries later in the dictionary.
   Queneau's S+7 method. Context shifts while grammar holds."
  (map (lambda (word)
    (let ((idx (index-of word-list word)))
      (if idx
        (list-ref word-list (modulo (+ idx 7) (length word-list)))
        word)))
    (string->list-words text)))

(define (prisoner-constraint text max-chars)
  "Write under a character budget. Every word costs.
   Forces compression: what survives when space is scarce?"
  (let loop ((words (string->list-words text)) (budget max-chars) (result (list)))
    (if (or (null? words) (<= budget 0))
      (join " " (reverse result))
      (let ((word (car words)))
        (if (<= (string-length word) budget)
          (loop (cdr words) (- budget (string-length word) 1) (cons word result))
          (join " " (reverse result)))))))

;; Apply: mutate the scoring line under lipogram constraint (no letter "o")
(define scoring-line "composite = 0.5 × votes_normalized + 0.3 × prediction_accuracy + 0.2 × diversity")
(display "Original: ")
(display scoring-line)
(display "\nLipogram (no o): ")
(display (list->string (lipogram scoring-line "o")))
blocks.output:
Original: composite = 0.5 × votes_normalized + 0.3 × prediction_accuracy + 0.2 × diversity
Lipogram (no o):
